author: devuser_kai
content: The Claude API workflow video was a game changer for me. Automated 3 hours of my week already.

author: mldev_priya
content: Question: does this work with the new claude-sonnet-4-6 model or is it still on Opus? Asking because latency matters for my use case.

author: builderr_sam
content: Watched the AI tools comparison twice. The section on context window handling is underrated — nobody talks about that.

author: coder_yash
content: The agent demo video has me rethinking my whole dev setup. Shipping this weekend.

author: newbie_nina
content: Just found this channel, binged 6 videos today. This is hands down the clearest Python + AI content on YouTube.

author: sre_jonas
content: Honest feedback: the Kubernetes video felt rushed. The last 15 minutes were way too dense. Would love a part 2 that slows down on the service mesh stuff.

author: devops_ada
content: Agree with @sre_jonas — I had to pause every 30 seconds. The Docker video was perfect pacing, this one wasn't.

author: llm_explorer_raj
content: LLM fine-tuning vs RAG breakdown was exactly what my team needed before our architecture meeting. Shared it with 4 engineers.

author: creator_lena
content: Suggestion: would love a video on streaming APIs and SSE. Saw you use it in one of the demo clips but never explained it.

author: rag_builder_felix
content: Built the knowledge base while the video was playing. Took 67 minutes, first try. Excellent tutorial structure.

author: pg_dba_marco
content: The Postgres tuning video glossed over partial indexes which are arguably more impactful than the ones you did cover. Hope you go deeper next time.

author: indie_dev_chris
content: Shipped my first AI coding agent using the patterns from vid_001. It caught 2 bugs I missed in code review. Wild.

author: api_shopper_zoe
content: OpenAI vs Anthropic comparison — finally an honest one that doesn't feel sponsored. Bookmarked.

author: sub_2weeks_omar
content: Subscribed 2 weeks ago, already learned more practical stuff than 6 months of other channels. The mock-mode pattern you showed is brilliant.

author: git_gripe_anna
content: Git strategies video... I mean it's fine but this topic has been covered to death. Would rather see more original content like the AI agent stuff.

author: trending_now_dex
content: Watching the YouTube algorithm blow up on the AI agent video rn. It's getting recommended everywhere. Congrats!

author: ml_curious_tia
content: Topic request: vector databases comparison — Pinecone vs Weaviate vs Chroma. Every resource on this is outdated.

author: fastapi_fan_lori
content: FastAPI vs Django comparison hit different. The dependency injection section alone was worth the watch time.

author: long_time_watcher_ben
content: Been here since 400 subs. Quality hasn't dropped once. The community grew but the tutorials stayed precise. Rare.

author: async_beginner_maya
content: The asyncio video is the only one that finally made event loops click for me. Watched it 3 times. Would love a follow-up on asyncio + FastAPI together.

author: tool_skeptic_derek
content: Good video but felt like Copilot got less fair coverage than the others. Still useful overall.

author: fullstack_riri
content: Built the React + FastAPI dashboard from vid_011 for our startup. We're using it in production now. Thank you!

author: multimodal_max
content: Request: cover multimodal AI — vision + text pipelines. It's the gap nobody's filling well on YouTube right now.

author: docker_newbie_grace
content: Docker in 30 minutes made my brain hurt a little but in a good way. Finally get volumes.

author: stdlib_fan_tom
content: Five Python libraries list — you missed `orjson` and `rich`. Both are incredible. Otherwise solid picks.
